title: Viva Maria!
actors: Brigitte Bardot, Jeanne Moreau, George Hamilton
plot: Somewhere in Central America in 1907: Maria II is the daughter of an Irish terrorist. After her father's death, she meets Maria I, a singer in a circus. She decides to stay with the circus, and on her debut as a singer, she uninte...
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award1 win & 3 nominations total
